productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Blue & White Striped Shirt
description: Composition Blue and white striped shirt with red accents, made of blended cotton, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar, buttoned placket, patch pocket on the left chest with stitch detailing and a curved hem Fit Slim Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub, bleach or iron directly on print/embroidery Drip dry Warm iron This formal shirt from mark taylor is crafted for the urban office-goer with its fashionable design and flattering slim fit. Show off your professional side with this signature shirt. Pair it with formal trousers, a leather belt and leather shoes for a smart day-to-night combination. Model statistics The model wears a size M in shirts with height 6' and shoulders 18"
